title: Word Search II
input_format: An `m x n` `board` of characters and a list of strings `words`.
constraints:
- `m == board.length`
- `n == board[i].length`
- `1 <= m, n <= 12`
- `board[i][j]` is a lowercase English letter.
- `1 <= words.length <= 3 * 10^4`
- `1 <= words[i].length <= 10`
- `words[i]` consists of lowercase English letters.
- All the strings of `words` are unique.
function_signature: function findWords(board: string[][], words: string[]): string[] {}
